<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Neurogenic Yoga™ & TRE® Teacher Training | 220-Hour Dual Certification</title>
<meta name="description" content="Become a trauma-skilled yoga teacher with our 220-hour dual certification in Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE® (Trauma Releasing Exercises). Online and live training for experienced yoga teachers ready to guide somatic healing and nervous system regulation.">
<meta name="keywords" content="Neurogenic Yoga, TRE, Trauma Releasing Exercises, yoga teacher training, trauma-informed yoga, somatic healing, nervous system regulation, yoga certification, continuing education, YACEP, dual certification, Jennica Mills, Maria Alfaro">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://neurogenicyoga.com/">

<!-- Open Graph / Social Media -->
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="Neurogenic Yoga™ & TRE® Teacher Training | 220-Hour Dual Certification">
<meta property="og:description" content="An immersive 220-hour certification in Neurogenic Yoga™ and Trauma Releasing Exercises® for experienced yoga teachers ready to guide somatic healing and resilience.">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="Neurogenic Yoga™ Teacher Training">

<!-- Twitter Card -->
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Neurogenic Yoga™ & TRE® Teacher Training | 220-Hour Dual Certification">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="An immersive 220-hour certification in Neurogenic Yoga™ and Trauma Releasing Exercises® for experienced yoga teachers.">

<!-- Structured Data -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Course",
  "name": "Neurogenic Yoga™ & TRE® Dual Certification Teacher Training",
  "description": "A 220-hour immersive certification in Neurogenic Yoga™ and Trauma Releasing Exercises® for experienced yoga teachers ready to guide somatic healing and resilience.",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Neurogenic Yoga"
  },
  "coursePrerequisites": "200-hour yoga teacher certification, minimum 1 year teaching experience, at least 50 hours of teaching",
  "educationalCredentialAwarded": "Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE® Dual Certification",
  "numberOfCredits": "220 hours",
  "offers": {
    "@type": "Offer",
    "price": "6400",
    "priceCurrency": "USD",
    "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
  },
  "hasCourseInstance": {
    "@type": "CourseInstance",
    "courseMode": ["online", "onsite"],
    "instructor": [
      {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Jennica Mills",
        "jobTitle": "Primary Trainer, Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga"
      },
      {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Maria Alfaro",
        "jobTitle": "Supporting Trainer, Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga"
      },
      {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "Alison Scola",
        "jobTitle": "Guest Instructor, Somatic Embodiment"
      }
    ]
  },
  "review": [
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "author": {"@type": "Person", "name": "Melissa Olvera"},
      "reviewBody": "This training reshaped my own healing journey and elevated the way I facilitate my classes and sessions."
    },
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "author": {"@type": "Person", "name": "Joseph Trinh"},
      "reviewBody": "Neurogenic Yoga Teacher/TRE provider training with Jennica was one of the most enriching experiences for self-development that I have ever had."
    },
    {
      "@type": "Review",
      "author": {"@type": "Person", "name": "Haley Picotte"},
      "reviewBody": "The Tension and Trauma Releasing Exercises and Neurogenic Yoga Dual Certification is of the highest quality and caliber of trainings available for Yoga professionals."
    }
  ]
}
</script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  /* Squarespace full-width override */
  html, body { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
  .sqs-block-code, .sqs-block-code .sqs-block-content,
  .sqs-layout, .sqs-col-12, .sqs-block {
    max-width: 100% !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  :root {
    --teal-deep: #1A5F6A;
    --teal-mid: #2E8B99;
    --teal-light: #E8F4F6;
    --teal-pale: #F4FAFB;
    --gold: #B8863A;
    --gold-light: #F9F2E7;
    --warm-white: #FDFAF7;
    --text-dark: #1C2B2E;
    --text-mid: #4A5E62;
    --text-light: #7A9298;
    --serif: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    --sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    background: var(--warm-white);
    color: var(--text-dark);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: auto;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 80px 48px 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background-color: var(--teal-deep);
    background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center center;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(
      105deg,
      rgba(20, 60, 68, 0.82) 0%,
      rgba(20, 60, 68, 0.65) 55%,
      rgba(20, 60, 68, 0.45) 100%
    );
  }
  .hero-inner {
    position: relative;
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(44px, 5vw, 68px);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .hero-title em {
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  }
  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold);
    color: white;
    padding: 16px 32px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #a07530; }
  .btn-ghost {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    color: white;
    padding: 16px 32px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); }

  .hero-right {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .hero-walkaway {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 32px 36px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .hero-walkaway-title {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .walkaway-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 14px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }
  .walkaway-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .walkaway-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 7px;
  }
  .walkaway-text {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .walkaway-text strong {
    font-weight: 500;
    color: white;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .hero-badges {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .badge {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    border-radius: 2px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 100px 48px; }
  .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal-mid);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 52px);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.15;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--teal-mid); }
  .section-body {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.85;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* FOR YOU */
  .for-you { background: var(--warm-white); padding-top: 60px; }
  .for-you-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: start;
    margin-top: 64px;
  }
  .for-you-left .section-body { margin-bottom: 20px; }

  .checklist {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .checklist-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 16px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1);
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .checklist-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .check-icon {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--teal-light);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--teal-mid);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .check-icon::after {
    content: '';
    width: 6px;
    height: 4px;
    border-left: 1.5px solid var(--teal-mid);
    border-bottom: 1.5px solid var(--teal-mid);
    transform: rotate(-45deg) translateY(-1px);
    display: block;
  }
  .checklist-text {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* PREREQS */
  .prereqs-box {
    background: var(--teal-pale);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--teal-mid);
    border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
    padding: 32px;
    margin-top: 32px;
  }
  .prereqs-box h4 {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .prereq-item {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    padding: 6px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.12);
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .prereq-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  /* WHAT YOU'LL GAIN */
  .gain { background: var(--teal-pale); }
  .gain-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 2px;
    margin-top: 56px;
    background: rgba(46,139,153,0.1);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gain-card {
    background: white;
    padding: 40px 32px;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .gain-card:hover { background: var(--teal-light); }
  .gain-num {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--teal-light);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .gain-title {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }
  .gain-body {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* PROGRAM STRUCTURE */
  .structure { background: white; }
  .structure-intro {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: end;
    margin-bottom: 64px;
  }

  .rhythm-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1);
  }
  .rhythm-row:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1); }
  .rhythm-left {
    background: var(--teal-pale);
    padding: 28px 24px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1);
  }
  .rhythm-name {
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .rhythm-timing {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-light);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .rhythm-right {
    padding: 28px 32px;
  }
  .rhythm-desc {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.75;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .phases-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 56px;
  }
  .phase-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.15);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .phase-header {
    background: var(--teal-deep);
    padding: 28px 28px 24px;
    min-height: 160px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }
  .phase-num {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .phase-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .phase-tagline {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: var(--serif);
  }
  .phase-body {
    padding: 24px 28px;
    background: white;
  }
  .phase-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.75;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .phase-reqs h5 {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal-mid);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .phase-req-item {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    padding: 6px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.08);
    font-weight: 300;
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .phase-req-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .phase-req-item::before {
    content: '•';
    color: var(--teal-mid);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-top: 1px;
  }

  /* TRAINER QUOTE */
  .quote-section {
    background: var(--teal-deep);
    padding: 80px 48px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .quote-mark {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 80px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    line-height: 0.5;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    display: block;
  }
  blockquote {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 30px);
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 780px;
    margin: 0 auto 32px;
  }
  .quote-attr {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* INVESTMENT */
  .investment { background: var(--gold-light); }
  .investment-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 64px;
    align-items: start;
    margin-top: 56px;
  }
  .investment-price {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 64px;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .investment-price-note {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-light);
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }
  .includes-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }
  .includes-item {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 16px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.15);
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .includes-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .includes-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gold);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }
  .includes-text {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .payment-box {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 32px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.2);
  }
  .payment-box h4 {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .payment-box p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.75;
    font-weight: 300;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .fine-print {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-top: 16px;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.15);
  }

  /* TRAINERS */
  .trainers { background: white; }
  .trainers-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 40px;
    margin-top: 56px;
  }
  .trainer-card {
    border: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.12);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .trainer-header {
    background: var(--teal-pale);
    padding: 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1);
  }
  .trainer-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .trainer-creds {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--teal-mid);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .trainer-body {
    padding: 24px 28px;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.8;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  .trainer-photo {
    width: 120px;
    height: 120px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* TESTIMONIALS */
  .testimonials { background: var(--teal-pale); }
  .testimonials-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 56px;
  }
  .testimonial-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 32px;
    position: relative;
    border: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.08);
  }
  .testimonial-quote-mark {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 48px;
    color: var(--teal-light);
    line-height: 0.8;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    display: block;
  }
  .testimonial-text {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-mid);
    line-height: 1.85;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .testimonial-name {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* CTA SECTION */
  .cta-section {
    background: var(--warm-white);
    padding: 100px 48px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .cta-inner {
    max-width: 620px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .cta-section .section-title {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .cta-section .section-body {
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .cta-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .btn-teal {
    background: var(--teal-deep);
    color: white;
    padding: 18px 40px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-teal:hover { background: var(--teal-mid); }
  .btn-outline-teal {
    border: 1.5px solid var(--teal-deep);
    color: var(--teal-deep);
    padding: 18px 40px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-outline-teal:hover { background: var(--teal-pale); }

  /* DIVIDER */
  .divider {
    width: 48px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--teal-mid);
    margin: 24px 0;
  }
  .divider-gold {
    width: 48px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--gold);
    margin: 24px 0;
  }
  .divider-center {
    margin: 24px auto;
  }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .hero-eyebrow { animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both; }
  .hero-title { animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both; }
  .hero-subtitle { animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both; }
  .hero-actions { animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.3s ease both; }
  .hero-right { animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.4s ease both; }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 0 24px; }
    section { padding: 72px 24px; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 24px 72px; }
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    .for-you-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    .gain-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .structure-intro { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .phases-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .investment-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .trainers-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .rhythm-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .rhythm-left { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1); }
    .primary-trainer-layout { flex-direction: column; }
    .trainer-photo { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HERO -->
<main id="main-wrapper">
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <p class="hero-eyebrow">220-Hour Dual Certification Program</p>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Become a <em>Trauma-Skilled Yoga Teacher</em></h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle">A 220-hour dual certification that gives you the science, the practice, and the mentorship to bring nervous system regulation and somatic trauma recovery into your teaching. Step fully into your role as a facilitator of deep, lasting transformation.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="https://calendly.com/jennicamills/trainingconsult" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">Schedule a Free Consultation</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-badges" style="margin-top: 36px;">
        <span class="badge">YA Recognized</span>
        <span class="badge">YACEP Approved</span>
        <span class="badge">Online & Live</span>
        <span class="badge">15 Per Cohort</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="hero-walkaway">
        <div class="hero-walkaway-title">What you walk away with</div>
        <div class="walkaway-item">
          <div class="walkaway-dot"></div>
          <div class="walkaway-text"><strong>Dual Certification:</strong> Fully certified to teach Neurogenic Yoga™ and facilitate TRE® with individuals and groups</div>
        </div>
        <div class="walkaway-item">
          <div class="walkaway-dot"></div>
          <div class="walkaway-text"><strong>Nervous System Fluency:</strong> A deep, embodied understanding of trauma, how the nervous system moves between states of safety, activation, and shutdown, and somatic healing you can actually teach from</div>
        </div>
        <div class="walkaway-item">
          <div class="walkaway-dot"></div>
          <div class="walkaway-text"><strong>Professional-Level Supervision:</strong> Guided practice with real students and detailed feedback from experienced trainers, so you finish ready to facilitate, not just educated</div>
        </div>
        <div class="walkaway-item">
          <div class="walkaway-dot"></div>
          <div class="walkaway-text"><strong>A Supportive Community:</strong> A warm, like-minded cohort of experienced teachers who grow together throughout the training and beyond</div>
        </div>
        <div class="walkaway-item">
          <div class="walkaway-dot"></div>
          <div class="walkaway-text"><strong>Your Own Healing:</strong> A personally transformative experience that deepens your relationship with your own body, your own nervous system, and your own resilience</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOR YOU -->
<section class="for-you" id="for-you" aria-label="Program prerequisites and ideal candidates">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="for-you-grid">
      <div class="for-you-left">
        <p class="section-label">Is This For You?</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">You already know yoga changes lives. <em>Now go deeper.</em></h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <p class="section-body">Your students come to you carrying more than tight hips and busy minds. They carry chronic stress, stored tension, and sometimes unprocessed trauma held in the body, often beneath words. This program gives you the tools, the science, and the lived experience to meet them there.</p>
        <p class="section-body" style="margin-top: 16px;">Whether you teach restorative yoga, vinyasa, therapeutic yoga, or anything in between, the Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE® Dual Certification will expand what's possible in your teaching.</p>

        <div class="prereqs-box">
          <h4>Prerequisites</h4>
          <div class="prereq-item">Certified yoga teacher (200hr minimum)</div>
          <div class="prereq-item">Teaching yoga for at least 1 year by the start of Phase 1</div>
          <div class="prereq-item">At least 50 hours of teaching experience by the start of Phase 1</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="for-you-right">
        <p class="section-label" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">This training is for you if…</p>
        <div class="checklist">
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You want to integrate nervous system regulation and trauma recovery into your teaching in a grounded, evidence-informed way.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You are committed to creating a safe and supportive space for your students to explore powerful somatic practices for greater freedom.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You're ready to deepen your own somatic practice alongside your professional development.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You want to empower your students to cultivate greater self-awareness, agency, and choice on their healing journey.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You're excited to join a supportive community of like-minded teachers, sharing knowledge, insights, and experiences in a collaborative learning environment.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="checklist-item">
            <div class="check-icon"></div>
            <div class="checklist-text">You believe in the body's innate capacity for self-healing, and you're ready to unlock your full potential as a somatic nervous system recovery specialist.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VIDEO -->
<section style="background: var(--teal-deep); padding: 80px 48px;">
  <div class="container">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: center;">
      <div>
        <p class="section-label" style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);">Hear It From Us</p>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="color: white;">Meet the people <em style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);">behind the training</em></h2>
        <div class="divider" style="background: var(--gold);"></div>
        <p class="section-body" style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-weight: 300;">Jennica, Maria, and Dr. David Berceli, the founder of TRE®, in conversation about the power of neurogenic tremoring, somatic healing, and why this work matters. Get a real sense of the depth, warmth, and expertise you'll be learning from.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">
          <iframe
            src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/u3NIkb3rJpQ"
            title="Interview with Jennica Mills, Maria Alfaro, and Dr. David Berceli"
            frameborder="0"
            allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
            allowfullscreen
            style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;">
          </iframe>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WHAT YOU'LL GAIN -->
<section class="gain" id="gain" aria-label="Program curriculum and learning outcomes">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label">What You'll Learn</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">A rigorous, <em>embodied</em> education</h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: center;">
      <div>
        <p class="section-body">This isn't just theory. Every concept is learned through direct experience in your own body, then applied to your teaching.</p>
        <p class="section-body" style="margin-top: 16px;">Across three progressive phases, you'll build a deep understanding of trauma physiology, nervous system regulation, and somatic release, then learn to guide others through it with confidence and competence.</p>
        <p class="section-body" style="margin-top: 16px;">By the end of this training, you won't just know the material. You'll have lived it.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Neurogenic Yoga and TRE teacher training cohort group photo" style="width: 100%; display: block; border-radius: 4px;">
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="gain-grid">
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">01</div>
        <div class="gain-title">The Neurophysiology of Trauma</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Understand the physiological impact of trauma and stress on the body, and the nervous system's innate mechanisms for releasing them.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">02</div>
        <div class="gain-title">Nervous System States in Practice</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Learn to recognize and respond to the nervous system's shifting states, and use that awareness to create safer, more responsive spaces for individuals and groups.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">03</div>
        <div class="gain-title">Neurogenic Yoga™ Sequencing</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Master the principles and sequencing of Neurogenic Yoga, integrating movement, breath, and tremoring for deep release.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">04</div>
        <div class="gain-title">TRE® Facilitation</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Learn to guide individuals and groups safely through Trauma Releasing Exercises, as developed by Dr. David Berceli.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">05</div>
        <div class="gain-title">Somatic Embodiment Practices</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Explore myofascial anatomy, breath-nervous system connections, and neuromuscular repatterning to release chronic tension.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="gain-card">
        <div class="gain-num">06</div>
        <div class="gain-title">Trauma-Informed Teaching</div>
        <div class="gain-body">Develop a trauma-informed lens for all your teaching, emphasizing safety, choice, and empowerment in every setting.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRAINER QUOTE -->
<div class="quote-section">
  <div class="container" style="text-align:center;">
    <span class="quote-mark">"</span>
    <blockquote>This work is my life's calling. I've watched teachers come into this program wanting to help their students heal, and discover that the healing starts with them. There is nothing more powerful than a teacher who has felt this work in their own body. That's what I want for every person who joins us.</blockquote>
    <p class="quote-attr">Jennica Mills, Lead Trainer &nbsp;·&nbsp; MSW, E-RYT, TRE Certification Trainer &nbsp;·&nbsp; Co-Creator of Neurogenic Yoga™</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROGRAM STRUCTURE -->
<section class="structure" id="structure" aria-label="Program structure and phases">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="structure-intro">
      <div>
        <p class="section-label">Program Structure</p>
        <h2 class="section-title">Three Phases. One clear <em>rhythm.</em></h2>
        <div class="divider"></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <p class="section-body">Our program unfolds across three progressive Phases: from your own personal practice, to working with individuals, to leading groups. Each Phase follows the same four-part rhythm, giving you time to absorb and integrate before expanding. The entire program is delivered live online, so you can participate from anywhere in the world.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="rhythm-row">
      <div class="rhythm-left">
        <div class="rhythm-name">Weekend Intensive</div>
        <div class="rhythm-timing">Sat & Sun · 2 full days</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rhythm-right">
        <p class="rhythm-desc">Each Phase kicks off with a two-day immersive weekend. New material is introduced through lecture, experiential learning, and group practice. Full engagement: body, mind, and nervous system. Live attendance with the full cohort is required.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rhythm-row">
      <div class="rhythm-left">
        <div class="rhythm-name">Content Sessions</div>
        <div class="rhythm-timing">2 sessions · 2 hours each</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rhythm-right">
        <p class="rhythm-desc">Two focused online sessions go deeper into the phase material. Join live or watch recordings at your own pace. Each session includes a short quiz to anchor your learning.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rhythm-row">
      <div class="rhythm-left">
        <div class="rhythm-name">Embodiment Lab</div>
        <div class="rhythm-timing">Half-day Saturday</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rhythm-right">
        <p class="rhythm-desc">A half-day gathering with no presentations. Just moving, tremoring, practicing, and integrating in community. This is where the learning lands in the body. Live attendance with the full cohort is required.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rhythm-row">
      <div class="rhythm-left">
        <div class="rhythm-name">Sessions & Supervision</div>
        <div class="rhythm-timing">Ongoing throughout</div>
      </div>
      <div class="rhythm-right">
        <p class="rhythm-desc">Between gatherings, you'll complete phase-specific requirements: private sessions with your trainer, peer teaching, and supervised student or group sessions. This is where your skills take root.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="phases-grid">
      <div class="phase-card">
        <div class="phase-header">
          <div class="phase-num">Phase 1: Embody</div>
          <div class="phase-name">Personal Foundations</div>
          <div class="phase-tagline">Discover your inner resilience and embark on a journey of personal transformation.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="phase-body">
          <p class="phase-desc">An immersive exploration of the foundational principles of Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE, grounded in your own personal practice. Before you guide anyone else, you'll develop a deep, personal relationship with the tremor response, stress physiology, and somatic release through direct experience in your own body.</p>
          <div class="phase-reqs">
            <h5>Phase Requirements</h5>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Weekend Intensive <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 full days, Sat & Sun</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">2 Content Sessions <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 hrs each</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Embodiment Lab <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">half-day Saturday</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="border-top: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1); margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 14px;">5 private sessions with Jennica</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">1 Group Shake with a Training Assistant</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">Personal practice, journaling, reading & video study</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="phase-card">
        <div class="phase-header">
          <div class="phase-num">Phase 2: Attune</div>
          <div class="phase-name">Working With Individuals</div>
          <div class="phase-tagline">Empower your students through personalized, one-on-one healing sessions.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="phase-body">
          <p class="phase-desc">Develop advanced skills for guiding individuals through Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE. Learn to read the body's cues, recognize signs of activation, and tailor your approach to each person's unique nervous system.</p>
          <div class="phase-reqs">
            <h5>Phase Requirements</h5>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Weekend Intensive <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 full days, Sat & Sun</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">2 Content Sessions <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 hrs each</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Embodiment Lab <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">half-day Saturday</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="border-top: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1); margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 14px;">Peer teaching practice sessions</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">5 Individual Supervisions (live or recorded)</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">1 Group Shake with a Training Assistant</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">Personal practice, journaling, reading & video study</div>
          </div>

          <!-- ALISON COURSE CARD (EXPANDABLE) -->
          <div class="somatic-card" style="margin-top: 24px; background: var(--gold-light); border: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.2); border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px 24px;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 10px;">
              <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
                <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold);">Guest Course</div>
                <div style="font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 17px; color: var(--text-dark); font-weight: 400;">Somatic Embodiment with Alison Scola</div>
              </div>
              <span style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(184,134,58,0.15); color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.3); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; white-space: nowrap;">Continues into Phase 3</span>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">This 16-hour course runs primarily within Phase 2, weaving somatic awareness and embodied facilitation skills into your individual practice work. A small concluding component carries into Phase 3, integrating what you've learned into your group teaching context.</p>

            <!-- Toggle Button -->
            <button onclick="toggleSomaticDetails(this)" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-top: 16px; padding: 0; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--sans); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: opacity 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.opacity='0.7'" onmouseout="this.style.opacity='1'">
              <span class="somatic-toggle-text">What you'll learn in this course</span>
              <svg class="somatic-toggle-arrow" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" style="transition: transform 0.3s ease;"><path d="M3.5 5.25L7 8.75L10.5 5.25" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
            </button>

            <!-- Expandable Details -->
            <div class="somatic-details" style="max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.5s ease, opacity 0.4s ease; opacity: 0;">
              <div style="padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.15); margin-top: 16px;">

                <p style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.85; font-weight: 300; margin: 0 0 20px 0;">Deepen your capacity to guide clients and groups through somatic embodiment practices that promote healing at a neurological and physiological level. You'll gain essential tools to help release long-held tension patterns, reprogram chronic bracing patterns, and regulate the nervous system through body-based techniques. Targeted somatic embodiment practices will equip you with a deeper understanding of the interconnectedness of trauma, posture, breath, and movement, empowering you to facilitate transformative healing in individual and group settings.</p>

                <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 14px;">In This 16-Hour Course You Will</div>

                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Develop and hold space for deeper interoceptive awareness, enhancing your ability to guide clients through somatic experiences in a safe and supportive way.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Learn somatic practices and neuro-muscular reprogramming exercises designed to release chronic, involuntary tension patterns that can obstruct healing.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Gain an in-depth understanding of myofascial anatomy through exploration of the Deep Front Line and its role in trauma response, posture, pain syndromes, and involuntary bracing patterns.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Recognize common trauma-based postural and bracing patterns, and understand their impact on physical and emotional well-being.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Deepen your understanding of the anatomy of the breath process and how it links to nervous system regulation, musculoskeletal function, and postural alignment.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start;">
                    <div style="flex-shrink: 0; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0.6;"></div>
                    <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;">Learn to identify involuntary bracing patterns and sequence appropriate practices that bring about resolution in individual and group settings, ensuring effective and lasting results.</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <p style="font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300; margin: 20px 0 0 0; font-style: italic; opacity: 0.85;">This aspect of the training provides you with advanced tools and techniques to facilitate somatic healing and nervous system regulation. Prepare to refine your practice and expand your ability to support clients on their journey to embodied wellness.</p>

              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <script>
            function toggleSomaticDetails(btn) {
              const details = btn.nextElementSibling;
              const arrow = btn.querySelector('.somatic-toggle-arrow');
              const text = btn.querySelector('.somatic-toggle-text');
              const isOpen = details.style.maxHeight !== '0px' && details.style.maxHeight !== '';

              if (isOpen) {
                details.style.maxHeight = '0';
                details.style.opacity = '0';
                arrow.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                text.textContent = 'What you\'ll learn in this course';
              } else {
                details.style.maxHeight = details.scrollHeight + 'px';
                details.style.opacity = '1';
                arrow.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                text.textContent = 'Show less';
              }
            }
          </script>

        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="phase-card">
        <div class="phase-header">
          <div class="phase-num">Phase 3: Tend</div>
          <div class="phase-name">Working With Groups</div>
          <div class="phase-tagline">Lead transformative group experiences and foster collective resilience.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="phase-body">
          <p class="phase-desc">Step into confident group facilitation. You'll explore group dynamics, safe container-building, and how to adapt practices for diverse participants, and emerge ready to lead Neurogenic Yoga™ and TRE classes.</p>
          <div class="phase-reqs">
            <h5>Phase Requirements</h5>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Weekend Intensive <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 full days, Sat & Sun</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">2 Content Sessions <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">2 hrs each</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="color: var(--teal-mid); font-weight: 400;">Embodiment Lab <span style="font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7;">half-day Saturday</span></div>
            <div class="phase-req-item" style="border-top: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.1); margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 14px;">4 Group Supervisions (live or recorded)</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">1 Group Shake with a Training Assistant</div>
            <div class="phase-req-item">Personal practice, journaling, reading & video study</div>
          </div>

          <!-- ALISON COURSE ECHO -->
          <div style="margin-top: 24px; background: rgba(184,134,58,0.06); border: 1px dashed rgba(184,134,58,0.3); border-radius: 4px; padding: 14px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;">
            <span style="font-size: 18px; opacity: 0.6;">↩</span>
            <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300; margin: 0;"><strong style="font-weight: 500; color: var(--gold);">Somatic Embodiment concludes here.</strong> The final component of Alison Scola's course carries into this phase, grounding your embodiment skills within your group facilitation practice.</p>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRAINING DATES CTA -->
<div style="background: var(--teal-deep); padding: 48px 48px; text-align: center;">
  <div class="container">

</div>

<!-- INVESTMENT -->
<section class="investment" id="investment" aria-label="Program pricing and payment options">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="section-label">Investment</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Everything you need <em>to thrive</em></h2>
    <div class="divider-gold"></div>
    <div class="investment-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="investment-price">$6,400</div>
        <div class="investment-price-note">*Excludes books, media, application fee ($50) and TRE enrollment fee ($35), approx. $250 additional.</div>
        <div class="includes-list">
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">Weekend Intensives, Content Sessions, and Embodiment Labs across all 3 phases, approximately 70 hours of live interaction with your Primary Trainer and certified training assistants</div>
          </div>
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">5 personal one-on-one sessions with your Primary Trainer, tailored to your individual growth (including your pre-program Foundation Session)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">9 professional supervisions with your Primary and Secondary Trainers, real feedback in a held container</div>
          </div>
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">The 16-hour Facilitating Somatic Embodiment course, guided by an expert in somatic healing and yoga therapies</div>
          </div>
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">Direct access to your Primary Trainer throughout the program: ask questions, share what's arising, and receive real-time guidance between sessions</div>
          </div>
          <div class="includes-item">
            <div class="includes-dot"></div>
            <div class="includes-text">A living cohort community, a space that grows with you, regularly expanded with content, resources, and reflections shaped by the group's needs</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="payment-box">
          <h4>Payment Options</h4>
          <p>A nonrefundable $500 deposit holds your spot once you receive your acceptance letter. If you choose not to join us for any reason, your deposit can be applied toward future trainings or personal sessions with Jennica. From there, flexible payment plans are available with no additional fees; we'll find an option that works for you.</p>
          <p>Schedule a free consultation to discuss your specific situation and payment preferences.</p>
          <a href="#consult" class="btn-teal" style="display:inline-block; margin-top: 8px;">Schedule a Consultation</a>
          <div class="fine-print">Foreign transaction fees apply for payments outside the United States.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRAINERS -->
<section class="trainers" id="trainers" aria-label="Meet your trainers">
  <div class="container">

    <h2 class="section-title">Guided by <em>experts who've lived this work</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- JENNICA - PRIMARY -->
    <div class="primary-trainer-layout" style="background: var(--teal-pale); border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(46,139,153,0.12); padding: 36px 40px; margin-bottom: 48px; display: flex; gap: 32px; align-items: flex-start;">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Jennica Mills, MSW, E-RYT, TRE Certification Trainer and Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga" class="trainer-photo">
      <div>
        <p class="section-label" style="margin-bottom: 6px;">Primary Trainer</p>
        <div style="font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--teal-deep); margin-bottom: 4px;">Jennica Mills</div>
        <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--teal-mid); letter-spacing: 0.06em; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 18px;">MSW &middot; E-RYT &middot; TRE Certification Trainer &middot; Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga</div>
        <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.85; font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 12px;">Jennica is your primary guide throughout this entire training. From your first weekend intensive through to your final group supervision, she is with you every step of the way, holding the container, knowing your process, and supporting your growth as both a practitioner and a teacher.</p>
        <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.85; font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 12px;">Her extensive work in somatic therapies, trauma recovery, and sexual wellness brings a unique and deeply human perspective to this work. She is known for creating an easeful, safe environment for powerful transformation, and for meeting each student exactly where they are.</p>
        <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.85; font-weight: 300;">When you enroll in this program, you are primarily enrolling to work with Jennica.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- MARIA + ALISON - SUPPORTING -->
    <p style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-light); margin-bottom: 20px;">Supporting Trainers</p>
    <div class="trainers-grid">
      <div class="trainer-card">
        <div class="trainer-header" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Maria Alfaro, E-RYT, TRE Certification Trainer and Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga" class="trainer-photo" style="width: 80px; height: 80px;">
          <div>
            <div class="trainer-name">Maria Alfaro</div>
            <div class="trainer-creds">E-RYT &middot; TRE Certification Trainer &middot; Co-Founder of Neurogenic Yoga</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="trainer-body">Maria brings extraordinary global depth to this training. She has taught TRE to thousands of people across the US, Canada, Europe, Asia, and the Middle East, and assisted Dr. Berceli directly in numerous trainings. You will work with Maria in 2 of your professional supervisions, benefiting from her rare breadth of experience.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="trainer-card">
        <div class="trainer-header" style="background: var(--gold-light); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(184,134,58,0.15); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Alison Scola, LMT, C-IAYT, E-RYT 500, Somatic Embodiment Instructor" class="trainer-photo" style="width: 80px; height: 80px;">
          <div>
            <div class="trainer-name" style="color: var(--text-dark);">Alison Scola</div>
            <div class="trainer-creds" style="color: var(--gold);">LMT &middot; C-IAYT &middot; E-RYT 500</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="trainer-body">Alison guides the 16-hour Somatic Embodiment course, bringing nearly three decades of experience in therapeutic yoga, somatic experiencing, Neuroaffective Touch, and bodywork. Her specialization in nervous system regulation and trauma-sensitive practices makes this course a deeply enlivening part of the program.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

        <span class="testimonial-quote-mark">"</span>

        <div class="testimonial-name">Melissa Olvera</div>
      </div>
      <div class="testimonial-card">
        <span class="testimonial-quote-mark">"</span>

Through a blend of learning scientific concepts and self-exploratory practice, the training helped me develop both as a teacher and a student. The invaluable lessons I learned about holding space, reading others' state of self-regulation, and guiding group energy added a special layer of depth to my yoga instruction.</p>

I can say with 100% confidence that the Tension and Trauma Releasing Exercises and Neurogenic Yoga Dual Certification is of the highest quality and caliber of trainings available for Yoga professionals. Jennica &amp; Maria are master trainers who know their craft inside and out and facilitate learning with expertise, compassion and professionalism.</p>
        <div class="testimonial-name">Haley Picotte</div>

<section class="cta-section" id="consult">
  <div class="cta-inner">
    <p class="section-label" style="text-align:center;">Ready to Begin?</p>
    <h2 class="section-title" style="text-align:center;">Your students are ready. <em>Are you?</em></h2>
    <div class="divider divider-center"></div>
    <p class="section-body" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom: 16px;">Each cohort is limited to 15 participants to ensure every student receives personal attention, meaningful supervision, and a genuine sense of community. This program is not for everyone, and that's by design.</p>
    <p class="section-body" style="text-align:center; margin-bottom: 40px;">Schedule a free consultation to ask questions, explore whether it's the right fit, and talk through payment options. No pressure, just a real conversation about where you are and where you want to go.</p>
    <div class="cta-buttons">
      <a href="https://calendly.com/jennicamills/trainingconsult" target="_blank" class="btn-teal">Schedule a Free Consultation</a>
      <a href="https://neurogenicyoga.com/apply-for-teacher-training" target="_blank" class="btn-outline-teal">Apply Now</a>
